# Typo in `allowed_paths` → did-you-mean suggestion in stderr.

mockd start
! agentctl run -f manifest.yaml
stderr 'unknown field "allowed_pots"'
stderr 'did you mean'
mockd assert-method-called RunAgent 0

-- manifest.yaml --
name: typo
command: ["/bin/true"]
allowed_hosts: []
allowed_pots: ["/srv"]
